org.apache.bookkeeper.meta.UnderreplicatedLedger

Package
Description
org.apache.bookkeeper.meta
Classes for interacting with bookkeeper ledgers and ledger metadata.

  • Uses of UnderreplicatedLedger in org.apache.bookkeeper.meta

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    UnderreplicatedLedger
    LedgerUnderreplicationManager.getLedgerUnreplicationInfo(long ledgerId)
    Get the UnderreplicatedLedger info if this ledger is marked underreplicated otherwise it returns null.

    Methods in org.apache.bookkeeper.meta that return types with arguments of type UnderreplicatedLedger
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Iterator<UnderreplicatedLedger>
    LedgerUnderreplicationManager.listLedgersToRereplicate(Predicate<List<String>> predicate)
    Get a list of all the underreplicated ledgers which have been marked for rereplication, filtered by the predicate on the missing replicas list.
    Iterator<UnderreplicatedLedger>
    NullMetadataBookieDriver.NullLedgerUnderreplicationManager.listLedgersToRereplicate(Predicate<List<String>> predicate)
     
    Iterator<UnderreplicatedLedger>
    ZkLedgerUnderreplicationManager.listLedgersToRereplicate(Predicate<List<String>> predicate)
    Get a list of all the underreplicated ledgers which have been marked for rereplication, filtered by the predicate on the replicas list.
